name: Almond Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugars.
2. Add the egg yolk and vanilla, mixing well.
3. Gradually stir in the flour until a dough forms.
4. Line a cookie sheet with parchment paper.
5. Spread the dough thinly onto the prepared cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 to 20 minutes, or until edges are lightly golden.
7. Remove from oven and let cool slightly.
8. Melt the chocolate chips over hot water, stirring until smooth.
9. Spread the melted chocolate evenly over the warm cookies.
10. Sprinkle chopped nuts evenly over the chocolate.
11. Press the nuts into the cookies gently.
12. Allow the cookies to cool completely before cutting into bars.
